name: Sour Cream Lemon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the dry ingredients except for 1 tablespoon sugar.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the wet ingredients: melted butter, sour cream, egg, and milk.
3. Stir the wet mixture into the dry ingredients until just combined.
4. Fold in the grated lemon peel and chopped pecans.
5. Divide the batter evenly among muffin cups.
6. Sprinkle the remaining sugar on top of each muffin.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Makes 12 muffins.
